headline: Caravan Fresh – The Cake & Pastry Shop wins Best Signature Pastry Design Award

content.text: Caravan Fresh – The Cake & Pastry Shop and the award record

Caravan Fresh – The Cake & Pastry Shop is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Signature Pastry Design Award. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Caravan Fresh – The Cake & Pastry Shop, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

The official Caravan Fresh site lists cakes, desserts, savouries, beverages, and bakery products. This row records the Best Signature Pastry Design Award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.

The Best Signature Pastry Design Award recognition places Caravan Fresh – The Cake & Pastry Shop in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
